name: Gulf War oil shock
notes: Iraq invasion of Kuwait; oil price spike; brief US recession (NBER Jul1990-Mar1991).

name: Asian crisis / LTCM
notes: Asian currency crises then LTCM collapse and Russian default; VIX spike late 1998; no US recession.

name: Dot-com bust
notes: Tech equity collapse; NBER recession Mar-Nov 2001.

name: Global food price crisis
notes: Grain/rice price surge and export bans; food-specific; only partially overlaps the GFC equity-stress window.

name: Global Financial Crisis
notes: NBER recession Dec2007-Jun2009; Lehman Sep2008; the canonical VIX/NBER crisis.

name: Russian wheat ban / Arab Spring food spike
notes: 2010 Russian wheat export ban and 2010-11 food-price spike linked to Arab Spring; little US equity stress.

name: European sovereign debt
notes: Greek/peripheral euro crisis; VIX spike Aug2011; no US recession.

name: Oil / commodity collapse
notes: Crude oil and broad commodity price collapse; energy-sector stress; no US recession.

name: COVID-19
notes: Pandemic crash; record VIX Mar2020; NBER recession Feb-Apr 2020.

name: Russia-Ukraine food-energy
notes: Invasion of Ukraine; wheat/energy price shock and inflation; equity drawdown but no NBER recession.
